overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban construction zone toward a busy intersection in Night City. The scene features massive unfinished structures, passing vehicles, and pedestrians under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road under the overpass toward the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway overhead
construction barriers with orange and white diagonal stripes lining the road
large futuristic building under construction with exposed framework and cranes

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete overpass structure with harsh shadows cast across the road. Orange and white construction barriers line the right side while the unfinished mega-structure looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with traffic control

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit intersection
traffic light changes to green, preparing to cross intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and waiting at the traffic light before crossing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signal lights at the intersection corner
red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Sequoia'
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide-open sunlit intersection. The Sequoia street sign and traffic light become visible as the character approaches the crosswalk, with the unfinished mega-structure now dominating the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with digital billboards

events.description: begins crossing the wide multi-lane intersection
person in pink shirt takes photo with phone while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink tank top taking photos with phone while crossing the street

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'NIGHT CITY' in bright cyan text
colorful neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distant cityscape

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection with the Night City billboard prominent on the left. Various futuristic cars pass by on the road while pedestrians cross in different directions, including a person in pink taking photos. The unfinished mega-structure shifts to the right side of the frame.

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues walking along the construction perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past construction barriers on the right

entered.detail: paved concrete walking surface with visible tile patterns

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the concrete sidewalk with orange and white construction barriers lining the right side. The Night City billboard remains visible in the distance to the left while the unfinished mega-structure stays prominent on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a construction zone into the bright, bustling activity of a wide city intersection. It begins by walking under a massive concrete overpass where harsh shadows fall across a road lined with orange and white construction barriers. As the camera emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where a Sequoia street sign and traffic light appear before a towering unfinished mega-structure. The view then expands across the crosswalk, passing futuristic cars and pedestrians, including a person in pink taking photos, while a prominent Night City billboard comes into view on the left. Finally, the camera moves onto the concrete sidewalk, continuing past the construction barriers with the billboard and the massive structure framing the urban landscape.
